title: DSDS Component Definitions
description: Definitions for the composite component document. A component document captures the identity of a reusable UI element. Modular metadata — status, category, tags, aliases, summary, thumbnail, preview, extends, since, and links — lives in the `metadata` array as typed entries. All structured docs — anatomy, API, variants, states, design specs, best practices, accessibility specs, use cases, and examples — live in the unified `documentBlocks` array as typed document block objects.

component.description: A single reusable UI component. Identity (name, displayName, description) lives at the top level. Modular metadata (status, category, tags, aliases, summary, thumbnail, preview, extends, since, links) lives in the `metadata` array as typed entries with a `kind` discriminator. All structured docs live in the `documentBlocks` array — each entry is a typed document block object (anatomy, api, variant, state, design-specifications, guideline, accessibility, etc.). This unified model replaces separate top-level properties for each concern.

kind.description: Identifies this entity as a component.

name.description: Machine-readable identifier (e.g., 'button', 'dialog', 'form-field', 'data-table'). MUST be unique within the documentation group.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for display in docs (e.g., 'Button', 'Dialog', 'Form Field', 'Data Table').

metadata.description: Modular metadata entries. Each entry is a typed object with a `kind` discriminator. Types include status, since, tags, category, aliases, summary, thumbnail, preview, extends, and links.

documentBlocks.description: All structured docs for this component as an ordered array of typed document block objects. Accepts component-specific types (anatomy, api, variants, states, design-specifications) and general types (guideline, purpose, accessibility, examples). Each document block entry has a `type` property that determines its shape. Ordering is significant: tools SHOULD preserve it for display.

agents.description: Agent-optimized context for this component — intent, constraints, disambiguation, anti-patterns, examples, and keywords for efficient agentic consumption.
